# Open Health Dispositions

| Event ID | Surface | Dimension | Object | Finding | Disposition | Date | Evidence | Closes |

| disp_20260625_000019 | plugin | quality | al-dev-solution-architect | Ambiguous analogue-match rule in Research phase: 'document the rationale before accepting the match' does not distinguish accept-with-rationale from reject-with-explanation. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: reword to 'a one-criterion match is acceptable only if the mismatch is documented AND it remains the best available analogue in the codebase'. |  |
| disp_20260625_000020 | plugin | quality | al-dev-commit-preflight | Bash block at SKILL.md:100 uses $ARGUMENTS without explaining it is harness-supplied; readers may not know its source. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: add preamble that $ARGUMENTS is the user's typed arguments after the skill name. |  |
| disp_20260625_000021 | plugin | quality | al-dev-developer-traditional | 'report pre-flight summary before coding starts' does not define what 'report' means (write a file, return text, or wait for approval). | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: specify report to user as text output, wait for approval before Step 4, stop if any item is unverified. |  |
| disp_20260625_000022 | plugin | quality | al-dev-script-engineer | SKILL.md:46-49 'Use asyncio + aiofiles when 2 or more concurrent I/O operations are needed' leaves 'concurrent' undefined (parallel vs. multiple sequential calls). | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: define 'concurrent' as parallel execution (e.g. asyncio.gather); sequential I/O stays synchronous. |  |
| disp_20260625_000023 | plugin | quality | al-dev-script-engineer | SKILL.md:45-101 Conventions section (pointer list) and Standards section (inline detail) both cover async-first and toolkit integration — overlapping coverage. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: merge into one Coding Standards section, or keep Conventions as a pure pointer with no overlapping topic restatement. |  |
| disp_20260625_000024 | plugin | quality | al-dev-ticket-context-writer | SKILL.md:59-67 Step 1.5 says to 'note' inline base64 images but never specifies where (context file, return block, or both). | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: note each inline image in the context file; report only INLINE_IMAGES_COUNT: [N] in the return block. |  |
| disp_20260625_000025 | plugin | quality | al-dev-commit | SKILL.md:48 'invoke /al-dev-commit-preflight with $ARGUMENTS' does not say whether to forward arguments verbatim or extract specific flags. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: specify pass the user's original typed arguments verbatim (or name the exact flags to extract). |  |
| disp_20260625_000026 | plugin | quality | al-dev-explore | SKILL.md:~63 the ls .dev/*-...-context.md glob is invoked 'optionally' but the body never states the fallback when it returns empty. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: add 'If no context file is found, continue without loading prior context.' |  |
| disp_20260625_000027 | plugin | quality | al-dev-interview | SKILL.md description omits Phase 1 (Pre-research Base App Context), which loads AL symbols before the interview agent is spawned. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: add to description 'runs pre-interview base app context research'. |  |
| disp_20260625_000028 | plugin | quality | al-dev-plan-final-review | SKILL.md:65 'Duplicate object IDs (reconcile from architect merge)' gives no reconciliation procedure, unlike other bullets in the same list. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: add procedure to identify which architect introduced each ID, verify duplicates serve different purposes, rename with a suffix. |  |
| disp_20260625_000029 | plugin | quality | al-dev-plan-final-review | SKILL.md description mentions running validate-plan.py but omits the Phase 2.5 scenario-coverage check, which is a distinct validation. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: add to description 'validates structural completeness and scenario coverage'. |  |
| disp_20260625_000030 | plugin | quality | verify-commits | SKILL.md:~29 'the user wants history rewritten' names the confirmation condition but never defines how approval is obtained. | accepted | 2026-06-25 | Accepted for implementation: ask 'Rewrite history to split these commits? (yes/no)' and proceed only on an explicit yes. |  |
